content: Cleaned 3 renderer files (App.tsx orphan-comment, TerminalPanel dead capturePendingIds+paneCount threading, ZoneLaunchModal identity useMemo); npm run build green; report+follow-ups in ARCHITECT/outputs/Renderer-UX.md.

Audited docs/frontend.md + README.md against renderer code; killed PreviewPanel section, agentRuntimeMode, getHomeDir/readFile, onCaptureState, mailbox/v4 cleanup blocks, mailbox.onActivity sentence; added shipped AssistantPanel + user-control-lock + plan-mode pill detail and corrected tab list to Canvas/Files/Terminal/Settings. Cross-doc drift flagged in ARCHITECT/outputs/Renderer-UX.md for orchestration.md, agent-behavior.md, CLAUDE.md (mailbox + harness vocabulary).

Audited zone-frontend in architect-canvas.json: 4 components (Desktop App, Dispatch Modal, Terminal Panel, Assistant Panel) all OK + map to shipped renderer code; edges e1/e19/e20/e21 → ipc-bridge all accurate; label+runtime+zIndex correct. No drift on what's there. Optional gaps flagged: Files Panel, Settings Panel, Canvas Palette are shipped top-level renderer surfaces not represented as components — product call. No edits made.
